calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Asha J. Harris, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION OF BLACK LAWYERS, INC.,
No appearance by defaulted defendant PANKAJ GUPTA,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Vernon Goines II sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $26,883.51
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,964.24
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $680.00
Punitive Damages: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,527.75

Court finds there are no reservation of rights for Punitive Damages.
Judgment signed in open court.
